scripts.run: bun run build && COLORMAN_INSTALL_DEV_ICONS=1 bun run build:resources && COLORMAN_ROOT="$PWD" gjs -m scripts/launcher.mjs
scripts.install-app: bun run build && bun run build:resources && (test -f _build/meson-private/coredata.dat || bun run setup) && meson compile -C _build && meson install -C _build
